extraction_reasoning: The litigation table has separate “By” and “Against” rows: I excluded the Company’s one criminal proceeding filed by it and counted only the “Against our Company” row, which reports 0 criminal, 4 tax, and 1 statutory/regulatory proceedings; all against rows for directors, promoters, KMP and SMP are nil or not applicable. The quantified aggregate amount against the Company is the table’s explicit ₹15.11 million amount, while the separate tax litigation describes ₹31.43306 lakh and is included within that aggregate; ₹15.11 million converts to ₹1.511 crore. The contingent-liabilities table is stated in ₹ million and dated December 31, 2024, but it has no stated Total row, so no contingent-liabilities total is extracted under the stated-total rule. Company-wide customer concentration is reported as a percentage of revenue from operations; for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2024, top five customers contributed 36.56% and top ten customers contributed 47.77%. The source monetary unit is ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
